skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: To analyze variations in mineral composition, samples of basalt were collected from 34 sites and cut into cubes. One such cube has an edge length of 4.000 centimeters and a density of 0.185 grams per cubic centimeter. What is the mass of this cube, in grams?
rationale: The volume of the cube is (4.000 cm)3 = 64 cubic centimeters. Since the density is 0.185 grams per cubic centimeter, the mass is (0.185 g/cm³)(64 cm³) = 11.84 grams.
